creator: mb@kotka.de
text:
I approve the patch.

I would also like to resign from port maintainership.

Am 30.08.2009 um 03:20 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:

> Maintainer of devel/ocaml-ounit,
>
> Please note that PR ports/138324 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/138324
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
